Up Close & Personal With Fr. Dave Tomaszycki Johnette Benkovic Williams discusses issues important to women and how they can best live out their faith in today's world.
programme.title: Women of Grace

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Rites of Passage- The Death of Self Host Jason Craig shows how individuality impacted the breakdown of traditional society, and shows why boys must die to their selves in order to follow Christ as a man.
programme.title: Rites of Passage- Leaving Boyhood Behind

programme.desc: The Franciscan Missionaries of the Eternal Word celebrate the Holy Sacrifice of the Mass from the Our Lady of Angels Chapel in Irondale, Ala.
programme.title: Daily Mass: Olam Daily Mass

programme.desc: Roundtable discussions unapologetically examining and analyzing important issues and events from a strictly Catholic perspective.
programme.title: EWTN News In-Depth

programme.desc: Daily news and analysis, from Washington, D.C.
programme.title: EWTN News Nightly

programme.desc: S01 E05 — The Heart of Jesus in Action Dr. O'Donnell explains how the heart of Jesus is moved to action by the sorrowful, the hungry and the lonely.
programme.title: The Love of the Heart of Jesus

programme.desc: Fr. Charles Connor examines the historical development of the major religious orders of men in the Catholic Church.
programme.title: Major Religious Orders of Men

programme.desc: Steven Hemler Pt 2 Author Steven Helmer shares how an authentic Catholic lifestyle reveals how to find truth and happiness.
programme.title: At Home With Jim and Joy

programme.desc: Davao: Christian Communities Fr Leo explores Davao, the Philippines, and visits Christian communities, the Carmelite monastery, and a humble neighborhood church.
programme.title: Savoring Our Faith

programme.title: The Holy Rosary With Mother Angelica

programme.desc: S02 E07 — New Life In Jesus Christ Mother Angelica explains experiencing new life in Christ and being raised up with Christ to eternal life.
programme.title: From the Heart, With Mother Angelica

programme.desc: Motherly Mission Of Hope This convert overcame a deep family tragedy, and now raises her five young children thanks to God's grace and her strong Catholic faith.
programme.title: Catholics Come Home

programme.desc: Holy Family Solar Led Garden Statue An assortment of religious articles from around the world.
programme.title: EWTN Religious Catalogue

programme.desc: Mother Seton's Baltimore Home, Her Life And Ministry To Girls Fr. Charles Connor joins Blaine Carvalho in exploring Elizabeth Ann Seton's home: the site where she began her school and the St. Mary's Spiritual Center.
programme.title: Catholic Beginnings

programme.desc: Mother Angelica and the Nuns of Our Lady of the Angels Monastery ask for the intercession of the Prince of the Heavenly Hosts and the nine Choirs of Angels, as they pray the chaplet of St. Michael.
programme.title: The Chaplet of St. Michael

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Joyful Mysteries Fr. Mitch Pacwa leads the Joyful Mysteries of the Rosary from the actual holy sites and shrines where they took place, bringing the Gospels to life and offering a deeper understanding of the Rosary meditations.
programme.title: Holy Land Rosary

programme.title: Daily Mass

programme.desc: An exploration of the worldwide Catholic evangelization movement, founded in 1917 by St. Maximilian Kolbe, that encourages total consecration to the Virgin Mary as a means of spiritual renewal for individuals and society.
programme.title: Militia of the Immaculata

programme.desc: A documentary on Shawn Riney, a man born with Down Syndrome, and how his life touches the hearts of families who know him.
programme.title: Shawn's Eyes

programme.desc: S07 E06 — The Leaven Fr. John runs out of leaven while baking and Timothy offers a substitute ingredient that changes the recipe drastically.
programme.title: The Friar

programme.desc: Mary's Police Force The importance of forgiveness and how we receive the absolution of Jesus in confession.
programme.title: Hi Lucy

programme.desc: S01 E04 — What Are The Gifts Of The Holy Spirit? Who Is The Holy Spirit? Explains what the Holy Spirit and who the Third Person of Trinity is while showing the graces that God makes available through the Holy Spirit in Baptism and Confirmation.
programme.title: Adventure Catechism

programme.desc: S03 E09 — Saint Joseph St. Joseph was a protector of the family and an example of faith and obedience to God.
programme.title: My Catholic Family

programme.desc: Steven Hemler Pt 2 Author Steven Helmer shares how an authentic Catholic lifestyle reveals how to find truth and happiness.
programme.title: At Home With Jim and Joy

programme.desc: S01 E30 — Blessed Frederic Bob and Penny Lord travel to Quebec to examine the life of Blessed Frederic, a Franciscan priest who served the Church in Europe, the Holy Land and Canada.
programme.title: Bob and Penny Lord Present

programme.desc: Holy Mass honoring St. Anthony of Padua, a Portuguese Franciscan priest known for his love and devotion to the poor and sick, from the shrine that bears his name in Padua, Italy.
programme.title: Holy Mass On the Feast of ST. Anthony of Padua

programme.desc: God's Mission For Man The filmmakers examine how God calls people to reclaim the work that resists burnout and restores balance through faith, purpose and rest.
programme.title: Into the Breach: the Dignity of Work

programme.desc: Holy Family Solar Led Garden Statue An assortment of religious articles from around the world.
programme.title: EWTN Religious Catalogue

programme.title: Dominican Sisters of Mary, Mother of the Eucharist

programme.desc: Elisabetta Valgiusti traverses the history of the Catholic Church in Jordan and visits the site of Jesus' baptism, as well as other holy sites in the area.
programme.title: Jordan's Christians: People of the Holy Land

programme.desc: Dr. Lisa Heerema Came from a Reformed Christian background, and became interested in the Catholic Church through history, liturgy, and the sacraments, but had many questions, including about the saints.
programme.title: The Journey Home

programme.desc: Understanding Reality David Anders questions atheists, former Catholics and non-Catholics, while answering questions about the Eucharist, the Douay-Rheims Bible translation and the relationship of the Catholic Church to the seven churches mentioned in Revelation.
programme.title: Called to Communion with Dr. David Anders

programme.desc: In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Jentezen Franklin is the Senior Pastor of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church. Each week his television program, Kingdom Connection, is broadcast on major networks all over the world. A New York Times best-selling author, Jentezen has written ten books including his most recent Acres of Diamonds, Love Like You’ve Never Been Hurt, the ground-breaking Fasting and Right People-Right Place-Right Plan.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.
